text.title: Product Discovery Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Product Discovery. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Classify every assumption into exactly one of: Value, Usability, Feasibility, Business-Viability. Unclassified assumptions cannot be tested.
rule.rationale: Classify every assumption into exactly one of: Value, Usability, Feasibility, Business-Viability. Unclassified assumptions cannot be tested.

rule.statement: Test the highest-severity assumption first; never default to the easiest test.
rule.rationale: Test the highest-severity assumption first; never default to the easiest test.

rule.statement: Every experiment names a kill threshold before it runs; results above kill → continue, below → kill.
rule.rationale: Every experiment names a kill threshold before it runs; results above kill → continue, below → kill.

rule.statement: Prefer prototypes over code, scripts over services, fakes over builds; never run production code during discovery.
rule.rationale: Prefer prototypes over code, scripts over services, fakes over builds; never run production code during discovery.

rule.statement: Maximum 2 active experiments per cycle; the rest queue.
rule.rationale: Maximum 2 active experiments per cycle; the rest queue.

rule.statement: Discovery cycle is timeboxed to 1-4 weeks; extension requires a written reason.
rule.rationale: Discovery cycle is timeboxed to 1-4 weeks; extension requires a written reason.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-product-discovery.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
